scripts.clean: pnpm --filter @mindpal/shared --if-present run clean && pnpm --filter @mindpal/api --if-present run clean && pnpm --filter @mindpal/worker --if-present run clean && pnpm --filter @mindpal/device-agent --if-present run clean && pnpm --filter @mindpal/runner --if-present run clean && pnpm --filter @mindpal/admin-cli --if-present run clean
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @mindpal/shared run build && pnpm --filter @mindpal/device-agent-sdk run build && pnpm --filter @mindpal/api run build && pnpm --filter @mindpal/worker run build && pnpm --filter @mindpal/device-agent run build && pnpm --filter @mindpal/runner run build && pnpm --filter @mindpal/admin-cli run build && pnpm --filter @mindpal/web run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @mindpal/api run test && pnpm --filter @mindpal/device-agent run test && pnpm --filter @mindpal/web run test && pnpm --filter @mindpal/worker run test && pnpm --filter @mindpal/shared run test
scripts.verify: pnpm run lint && pnpm run boundary-scan && pnpm run build && pnpm test
scripts.verify:arch07: pnpm run build && pnpm run lint && pnpm test
